records.question: Which physicians lead the Surgery department and have certifications that started on or after 2008-01-01 and expire exactly on 2008-12-31?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN department ON physician.employeeid = department.head
JOIN trained_in ON physician.employeeid = trained_in.physician
WHERE trained_in.certificationexpires = '2008-12-31' AND department.name = 'Surgery' AND trained_in.certificationdate >= '2008-01-01'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid
FROM physician
JOIN department ON physician.employeeid = department.head
JOIN trained_in ON physician.employeeid = trained_in.physician
WHERE department.name = 'Surgery'
  AND trained_in.certificationexpires = '2008-12-31'
  AND trained_in.certificationdate >= '2008-01-01'
GROUP BY physician.employeeid
HAVING COUNT(department.departmentid) > 0
  AND COUNT(trained_in.treatment) > 0

records.question: Which physicians lead the Surgery department and were certified on or before 2008-01-01?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN department ON physician.employeeid = department.head
JOIN trained_in ON physician.employeeid = trained_in.physician
WHERE trained_in.certificationdate <= '2008-01-01' AND department.name = 'Surgery'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid
FROM physician
JOIN department ON physician.employeeid = department.head
JOIN trained_in ON physician.employeeid = trained_in.physician
WHERE department.name = 'Surgery' AND trained_in.certificationdate <= '2008-01-01'
GROUP BY physician.employeeid
HAVING COUNT(department.departmentid) > 0 AND COUNT(trained_in.treatment) > 0

records.question: Which attending physicians named Elliot Reid have a social security number of at least 222222222 and had appointments in examination room B on or before 2008-04-24 11:00 with registered nurse Carla Espinosa?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN appointment ON physician.employeeid = appointment.physician
JOIN nurse ON appointment.prepnurse = nurse.employeeid
WHERE appointment.end <= '2008-04-24 11:00' AND physician.position = 'Attending Physician' AND nurse.name = 'Carla Espinosa' AND appointment.examinationroom = 'B' AND nurse.registered = 1 AND physician.ssn >= 222222222 AND physician.name = 'Elliot Reid'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.EmployeeID
FROM Physician p
JOIN Appointment a ON p.EmployeeID = a.Physician
JOIN Nurse n ON a.PrepNurse = n.EmployeeID
WHERE p.Position = 'Attending Physician'
  AND p.SSN >= 222222222
  AND p.Name = 'Elliot Reid'
  AND a.End <= '2008-04-24 11:00'
  AND a.ExaminationRoom = 'B'
  AND n.Name = 'Carla Espinosa'
  AND n.Registered = 1

records.question: Which physicians named John Dorian with SSN 111111111 and position Staff Internist have patients named John Smith living at 42 Foobar Lane with phone 555-0256 and insurance ID at least 68476213?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN patient ON physician.employeeid = patient.pcp
WHERE patient.insuranceid >= 68476213 AND physician.ssn = 111111111 AND patient.name = 'John Smith' AND physician.name = 'John Dorian' AND patient.address = '42 Foobar Lane' AND physician.position = 'Staff Internist' AND patient.phone = '555-0256'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid
FROM physician
JOIN patient ON physician.employeeid = patient.pcp
WHERE physician.ssn = '111111111'
  AND physician.name = 'John Dorian'
  AND physician.position = 'Staff Internist'
  AND patient.insuranceid = 68476213
  AND patient.name = 'John Smith'
  AND patient.address = '42 Foobar Lane'
  AND patient.phone = '555-0256'

records.question: Which Surgical Attending Physician named John Wen, with SSN 777777777, heads the Surgery department and has training certifications dated at least 2008-01-01 that expire no earlier than 2008-12-31?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN department ON physician.employeeid = department.head
JOIN trained_in ON physician.employeeid = trained_in.physician
WHERE physician.position = 'Surgical Attending Physician' AND physician.ssn = 777777777 AND physician.name = 'John Wen' AND department.name = 'Surgery' AND trained_in.certificationdate >= '2008-01-01' AND trained_in.certificationexpires >= '2008-12-31'

SELECT physician.employeeid
FROM physician
JOIN department ON physician.employeeid = department.head
JOIN trained_in ON physician.employeeid = trained_in.physician
WHERE physician.position = 'Surgical Attending Physician'
  AND physician.ssn = 777777777
  AND physician.name = 'John Wen'
  AND department.name = 'Surgery'
  AND trained_in.certificationdate >= '2008-01-01'
  AND trained_in.certificationexpires >= '2008-12-31'

records.question: Which physicians hold the position of Attending Psychiatrist and have a primary affiliation with a department?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN affiliated_with ON physician.employeeid = affiliated_with.physician
JOIN department ON affiliated_with.department = department.departmentid
WHERE physician.position = 'Attending Psychiatrist' AND affiliated_with.primaryaffiliation = 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid
FROM physician
JOIN affiliated_with ON physician.employeeid = affiliated_with.physician
JOIN department ON affiliated_with.department = department.departmentid
WHERE physician.position = 'Attending Psychiatrist' AND affiliated_with.primaryaffiliation = 1
